name: parabun-browser-shims
description: Browser-compatible shims for the para:* Lib modules Parabun parse-time desugaring pulls in (para:arena, para:signals, para:parallel, para:simd) plus best-effort fallbacks for a couple of parabun:* runtime modules (parabun:gpu has a CPU + WebGPU backend; parabun:llm currently throws a clear not-implemented error). Lets .pts / .pjs code compile and run in browsers — at varying fidelity per module.
